2026-04-25 15:37:35 RETAINModel(
  (embedding_model): EmbeddingModel(embedding_layers=ModuleDict(
    (conditions): Embedding(3999, 128, padding_idx=0)
    (procedures): Embedding(1297, 128, padding_idx=0)
    (drugs): Embedding(2530, 128, padding_idx=0)
  ))
  (retain): ModuleDict(
    (conditions): RETAINLayer(
      (dropout_layer): Dropout(p=0.5, inplace=False)
    )
    (procedures): RETAINLayer(
      (dropout_layer): Dropout(p=0.5, inplace=False)
    )
    (drugs): RETAINLayer(
      (dropout_layer): Dropout(p=0.5, inplace=False)
    )
  )
  (fc): Linear(in_features=384, out_features=1, bias=True)
  (focal): FocalLoss()
)
